bugs.fix: Changed hover: text-foreground', → text-foreground py-1 rounded-lg',
Changed width: 2.25rem → 3rem; height: 2.25rem → 3rem; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 0.85) → calc(var(--radius) * 1.1)

bugs.root_cause: The floating action button relied on regular button sizing and child content, so the Ant Design themed button root stretched the circle into an oval.
bugs.fix: Converted the FABs to explicit icon-only Ant Design buttons with fixed height, width, min-width, and zero padding.

bugs.error_message: Chats page looks broken; composer layout is not normal and send button shadow is missing
bugs.root_cause: Ant Design Card wraps children in an internal body, so flex classes on the Card root did not align input and send button; send button also lacked explicit illustration shadow style in this context.
bugs.fix: Replaced composer Card wrapper with a dedicated inline row container, made send action icon-only circular button, and added explicit illustration-style box shadow while keeping AntD primitives.

bugs.error_message: Chats list page looks ugly and not production ready
bugs.root_cause: Chat list cards had weak hierarchy (oversized titles, inconsistent metadata rows), no fallback for malformed titles, and no ordering by latest activity.
bugs.fix: Redesigned list cards with clearer typography and spacing, added safe title fallback, added latest-activity sorting, tightened preview text behavior, and standardized attendee tags.

bugs.error_message: Discover buttons should match chat send button style; chats page has overly pink cards and oversized +1 overflow badge
bugs.root_cause: Discover icon buttons used mixed sizing/shadow styles, Card theme color leaned too pink for list surfaces, and Avatar.Group overflow badge inherited oversized default typography.
bugs.fix: Unified Discover icon button classes with the chat send button style, changed Card theme background to a neutral cream, and explicitly constrained Avatar.Group overflow badge size and font.

bugs.error_message: Floating Discover + and crosshair icons are too small and not visually centered
bugs.root_cause: Floating action buttons used smaller icon sizes and insufficient enforced centering for icon-only controls under the illustration button styling.
bugs.fix: Increased both floating button sizes and icon sizes, and forced inline-flex centering with explicit width/min-width/padding constraints.

bugs.error_message: Create flow select looked broken and the full flow felt non-production
bugs.root_cause: Step-0 select lacked explicit full-width sizing and the flow lacked consistent spacing, section hierarchy, and a stable mobile action footer.
bugs.fix: Redesigned CreatePage step cards with clearer hierarchy, made sport select full-width and large, improved copy and spacing across all steps, and added a sticky production-style action footer.

bugs.error_message: Profile page is not production-level (cluttered editor, noisy session cards, weak danger-zone layout)
bugs.root_cause: Profile editing controls and session sections used dense, inconsistent layout patterns and reused a heavy event card not optimized for profile context.
bugs.fix: Reworked profile summary and editor hierarchy, converted interests to grouped checkbox grids, tightened danger-zone actions, and replaced hosted/joined blocks with compact profile-specific session cards including malformed-title fallback.

bugs.error_message: Session details page not production-level; stats layout collapsed and malformed title/description leaked into UI
bugs.root_cause: Card-root utility layout classes were used where AntD Card body wrappers controlled content layout; raw event text without guardrails surfaced placeholder punctuation values.
bugs.fix: Moved key layouts into explicit inner wrappers, reworked details/session setup cards, added text readability fallbacks for title/description/safety note, and tightened action styling for a cleaner production surface.

bugs.error_message: Discover selected-event map tray shows malformed content and map interactions feel rough
bugs.root_cause: Selected event preview lacked fallback text handling and map interactions had no deselect affordance when tapping empty map space.
bugs.fix: Added safe title/description fallbacks in selected tray, improved tray card body formatting, enabled map click to clear selection via EventMap selection handler, and updated helper copy.

bugs.error_message: Selected-event tray should overlay floating buttons instead of pushing them upward
bugs.root_cause: Floating action button container used dynamic bottom offsets tied to tray state, and tray layering sat below actions.
bugs.fix: Pinned floating actions to a fixed bottom position and raised bottom tray z-index above action stack so tray covers actions when shown.

bugs.error_message: Crosshair icon in Discover floating button appears too high and not centered
bugs.root_cause: Icon optical center sat above the button's geometric center under current icon metrics and stroke weight.
bugs.fix: Applied a small downward transform to the crosshair icon in the floating action button for visual centering.
